testcase.name: test_pickle_custom_cache_dir

failure.message: TypeError: HTTPClient.request() got an unexpected keyword argument 'stream'

testcase.failure:
self = <bpemb.tests.bpemb_test.BPEmbTest testMethod=test_pickle_custom_cache_dir>
def test_pickle_custom_cache_dir(self): import pickle from tempfile import mkdtemp from pathlib import Path > bpemb = BPEmb(lang="en", vs=1000, dim=25, cache_dir=mkdtemp()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
bpemb/tests/bpemb_test.py:92: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ bpemb/bpemb.py:174: in __init__ self.model_file = self._load_file(model_file) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ bpemb/bpemb.py:234: in _load_file return http_get(file_url, cached_file, ignore_tardir=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ bpemb/util.py:48: in http_get headers = http_get_temp(url, temp_file) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ bpemb/util.py:23: in http_get_temp req = treq.get(url, stream=True, verify=False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/treq/api.py:23: in get return _client(kwargs).get(url, headers=headers, _stacklevel=4, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <treq.client.HTTPClient object at 0x108a38cd0> url = 'https://nlp.h-its.org/bpemb/en/en.wiki.bpe.vs1000.model' kwargs = {'_stacklevel': 4, 'headers': None, 'stream': True, 'verify': False}
def get(self, url: _URLType, **kwargs: Any) -> "Deferred[_Response]": """ See :func:`treq.get()`. """ kwargs.setdefault("_stacklevel", 3) > return self.request("GET", url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: HTTPClient.request() got an unexpected keyword argument 'stream'
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/treq/client.py:151: TypeError

testcase.name: test_pickle_custom_no_cache

failure.message: TypeError: HTTPClient.request() got an unexpected keyword argument 'stream'

testcase.failure:
self = <bpemb.tests.bpemb_test.BPEmbTest testMethod=test_pickle_custom_no_cache>
def test_pickle_custom_no_cache(self): import pickle from tempfile import mkdtemp from pathlib import Path import shutil cache_dir = mkdtemp() > bpemb = BPEmb(lang="en", vs=1000, dim=25, cache_dir=cache_dir) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
bpemb/tests/bpemb_test.py:110: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ bpemb/bpemb.py:174: in __init__ self.model_file = self._load_file(model_file) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ bpemb/bpemb.py:234: in _load_file return http_get(file_url, cached_file, ignore_tardir=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ bpemb/util.py:48: in http_get headers = http_get_temp(url, temp_file) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ bpemb/util.py:23: in http_get_temp req = treq.get(url, stream=True, verify=False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/treq/api.py:23: in get return _client(kwargs).get(url, headers=headers, _stacklevel=4, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <treq.client.HTTPClient object at 0x108cca510> url = 'https://nlp.h-its.org/bpemb/en/en.wiki.bpe.vs1000.model' kwargs = {'_stacklevel': 4, 'headers': None, 'stream': True, 'verify': False}
def get(self, url: _URLType, **kwargs: Any) -> "Deferred[_Response]": """ See :func:`treq.get()`. """ kwargs.setdefault("_stacklevel", 3) > return self.request("GET", url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: HTTPClient.request() got an unexpected keyword argument 'stream'
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/treq/client.py:151: TypeError
